title: String Escape
description: Escape and unescape strings for JSON / JS / C / Shell / SQL / regex contexts; handles \xHH \uHHHH \u{} and octal, both directions live.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: All escaping runs in your browser — nothing is uploaded. Shell / SQL output includes the wrapping quotes so you can paste straight into a command or statement.

io.swap: Send output back to input and flip direction
